sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-style comprehension). Awaiting native-speaker review. Note: this is A2-level grammar that appears in the A1 book (Dossier 5); the A2 book will deepen it.
Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 5 'Temps forts' (le passé composé avec avoir). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
